holdings.infoBox: FENY is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 21.72%, Chevron at 14.24%, ConocoPhillips at 5.87%, The Williams Companies at 3.70%, and SLB N.V. at 3.36%.

overview.description: The Fidelity MSCI Energy Index ETF (FENY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA IMI Energy 25/50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of US energy companies FENY was launched on Oct 24, 2013 and is issued by Fidelity.
